text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text: Victory! ☆ Maya makes a triumphant return!

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text:
Ehehe! You're happy for me, right? Was your
heart pounding as I ran?
choice_data_list: There's still a ways to go!

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text:
But I figured something out! ♪ I think I know a
way to make your heart pound even harder—right
out of your chest!

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text: Sooooo! I hope you're ready for my next race! ☆

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text:
Aaah! ☆ You're incredible, Trainer! I feel the
same way!

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text:
You know what?! In the last stretch... I could see
the finish line twinkling super brightly!

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text:
But once I passed it, the twinkles and the
pounding in my chest went away...

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text:
And that's when I figured it out—I think I can
make your heart pound right out of your chest!

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text:
Sooooo! There's still a ways to go for you too! I
hope you're ready! ♪
